creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 207040
remove openssl dependency

My poudriere can't build linux-c7 correctly any more because linux-c7-trousers still depends on linux-c7-openssl, the attached patch fixes this.

The change to Mk/Uses/linux.mk in r509800 isn't enough to avoid this problem, because there's already a package of trousers with the dependency on the openssl package.

BR, Felix
